statement: In every magma, Equation 1545 (`x = (y * y) * (z * (z * z))`) implies Equation 419 (`x = x * (x * (y * (y * x)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0038
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op z (op z z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op x (op y (op y x))))
